---
title: "Posit + Snowflake: orbital in place (in Snowflake)"
format:
  revealjs:
    include-after-body:
      - js/orbital-inplace.html
---

```{=html}
<!-- Posit framing: the session runs inside Snowflake (Posit Team Native App). -->
<script>
  window.ORB_POSIT       = true;
  window.ORB_MODEL_LABEL = 'workflow()';
  window.ORB_SNOWFLAKE   = '#29B5E8';
  window.ORB_RSESSION    = '#276DC3';
</script>
```

## {.orb-slide}

::: {.orb-stage-wrap}
<div id="orb-title" class="orb-title"></div>
<div id="orb-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-compile"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-embed"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-run"}

<!-- Same choreography as orbital-inplace, but the Posit session is nested inside
     Snowflake: orbital() compiles the model to SQL, the SQL leaves the session
     for Snowflake's engine, runs in place, and the nested session winds down. -->
